nasb.text: “Which of you, having a slave plowing or tending sheep, will say to him when he has come in from the field, ‘Come immediately and sit down to eat’?

esv.text: “Will any one of you who has a servant    plowing or keeping sheep say to him when he has come in from the field, ‘Come at once and recline at table’?

cnv.text: “你們中間誰有僕人去耕地或是放羊，從田裡回來，你就對他說：‘快過來坐下吃飯’；

ccb.text: “你们谁会对种田或放羊回来的奴仆说，‘请赶快坐下来吃饭’？

csbs.text: “你们当中谁有奴仆耕田或放羊，从田里回来的时候，会对奴仆说‘立刻过来，坐下吃饭’呢？
